entries.title: PIX and Google Pay Support
entries.description: Added support for PIX and Google Pay as payment methods. Both are available immediately after upgrading with no additional configuration.

entries.title: Android 14 Crash
entries.description: Fixed a crash that occurred on Android 14 devices during SDK initialization. The issue was caused by a deprecated API removed in Android 14.

entries.title: Native Android SDK Version Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android SDK dependency to the latest version. No API changes required.

entries.title: Native Android SDK Version Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android SDK dependency to the latest version. No API changes required.

entries.title: Hindi, Bengali, Malayalam Support
entries.description: Added support for Hindi, Bengali, and Malayalam languages. No additional configuration is required to enable these languages.

entries.title: Native SDK Versions Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android and iOS SDK dependencies to their latest versions. No API changes required.
